sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 8.49 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.8)

statement.latex: Let$G$be a$p$-group acting transitively as a permutation group on a set$$, let$F$be a field of characteristic$p$, and regard$F$as an$FG$-module. Then do the descending and ascending Loewy series of$F$coincide? { P.\,M.\,Neumann} Yes, they do (J.\,L.\,Alperin, Quart. J. Math. Oxford (2), { 39}, no.\,154 (1988), 129--133).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
